research_question: In critically ill adult patients requiring nutrition support in the intensive care unit, what is the efficacy and safety of hypocaloric nutrition support (less than measured resting energy expenditure or less than 25 kcal/kg/day) compared to normocaloric or hypercaloric nutrition support or no nutrition support, on clinical outcomes including mortality, morbidity, length of stay, and metabolic complications?
